title: problem with geographic query
description:
Hi,
when I do a geographic query using st_distance, I get the following error
"Virtuoso VECSL Error VECSL: Geo chekc ro id is to be a vec ssl.  For support."
what does it mean?
Thanks,
Pierfrancesco
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE parking_spots (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, label TEXT, geometry TEXT, is_crowdsourced INTEGER, project_id INTEGER);
INSERT INTO parking_spots (id, label, geometry, is_crowdsourced, project_id) VALUES (1, 'Spot A', 'POINT(7.5 45.2)', 1, 101);
INSERT INTO parking_spots (id, label, geometry, is_crowdsourced, project_id) VALUES (2, 'Spot B', 'POINT(8.0 45.0)', NULL, 102);
SELECT id, label FROM parking_spots WHERE (ABS(7.5 - 7.8) + ABS(45.2 - 45.1)) < 1;
UPDATE parking_spots SET is_crowdsourced = 0 WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: Error during geographic query using st_distance function
